== Notes for [[Item:Q100420|Q100420]] ==

[http://berdichevsky.tribalpages.com/family-tree/berdichevsky/1195/513/Yosef-HaLevi-Family '''Berdichevsky-Sokolka Families Tree - HaLevi, Yosef HaNassi''']

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD862F111EFBBFA9822EF79916C85C0
geni:3915955572940125389

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
